title: The Garden
name: Redemption Camp
blurb: We will marry beneath the trees at Redemption Camp, where the lawns are wide and the morning light is kind. Everything happens in one garden, from the first hymn to the last dance.
openLine: The day begins at 10 in the morning

dressCode.title: Garden formal
dressCode.body: Long dresses, agbada, gele, and a well cut suit. Wear the house colours where you can: ivory, emerald, and gold. Kind shoes for soft grass are wise.

children.title: A celebration for all ages
children.body: Little ones are welcome to play on the lawn, with a quiet corner set aside for tired feet.
